summary: Iteration 47 testing complete. Square change-plan feature fully verified - backend API and frontend UI both working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: change-plan rejects invalid plan key with 400
VERIFIED: change-plan rejects same plan with 400 and helpful message
VERIFIED: change-plan handles pending swap correctly (Square queues changes for end of billing cycle)
VERIFIED: GET /api/square/status/{email} returns planLabel and cadence populated correctly
VERIFIED: Frontend ProfileTab shows Subscription section ONLY for Square subscribers
VERIFIED: Subscription section shows current plan name, label, status, and next billing date
VERIFIED: Change Plan button toggles plan options correctly
VERIFIED: Plan switch buttons call API and show success/error toast
VERIFIED: Owner user does NOT see Subscription section (sees Admin Settings instead)
VERIFIED: Lifetime user does NOT see Subscription section
test_credentials: xaviersteverson@gmail.com / test123456 (Square subscriber on monthly plan), josselj001@gmail.com (Owner)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified the Square change-plan feature. Key points: (1) The change-plan endpoint uses Square's swap_plan API which queues plan changes for end of billing cycle. If you swap weekly->monthly, trying to swap again immediately will fail with 'plan change already pending' - this is expected behavior. (2) The Subscription Manager section in ProfileTab ONLY renders when auth.accessType includes 'Square'. (3) Test user xaviersteverson@gmail.com is on monthly plan with a pending plan change already scheduled.
